schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The scheme “Allotment of Commercial Godown” is implemented by the Uttarakhand Agricultural Production & Marketing Board under the Department of Agriculture, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to facilitate ease of doing business for traders by providing licensed traders with access to commercial godowns for storage and management of their goods.
schemeContent.benefits_md: The scheme facilitates ease of doing business for traders by allotting them with commercial Godowns.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to facilitate ease of doing business for traders by providing licensed traders with access to commercial godowns for storage and management of their goods.

children.text: The scheme “Allotment of Commercial Godown” is implemented by the Uttarakhand Agricultural Production & Marketing Board under the Department of Agriculture, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to facilitate ease of doing business for traders by providing licensed traders with access to commercial godowns for storage and management of their goods.
The scheme facilitates ease of doing business for traders by allotting them with commercial Godowns.
Upon receiving information about godown allotment (through notices in newspapers and public places), obtain the application form from the Mandi Committee office by paying the prescribed fee.
Complete the application form with accurate details and submit it to the Mandi Committee office.
The Shop Allotment Committee conducts the allotment of commercial godowns.
Traders are selected in descending order based on the highest market fee deposited in the last three years, subject to availability of godowns.

applicationProcess.process_md: **Application Process:** - Upon receiving information about godown allotment (through notices in newspapers and public places), obtain the application form from the Mandi Committee office by paying the prescribed fee. - Complete the application form with accurate details and submit it to the Mandi Committee office. **Selection Process:** - The Shop Allotment Committee conducts the allotment of commercial godowns. - Traders are selected in descending order based on the highest market fee deposited in the last three years, subject to availability of godowns.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. The applicant must be a resident of Uttarakhand. 1. The applicant must hold a valid trader’s license issued by the Mandi Committee.

children.text: The applicant must be a resident of Uttarakhand.
The applicant must hold a valid trader’s license issued by the Mandi Committee.
